spec.title: Active Stress Nodes
spec.description: Nodes with non-zero equivalent stress range

spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Active Stress Nodes" FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Low (0–5 MPa)" FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 0 AND eqstressrange <= 5
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Moderate (5–20 MPa)" FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 5 AND eqstressrange <= 20
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "High (20–50 MPa)" FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 20 AND eqstressrange <= 50
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Critical (>50 MPa)" FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 50

spec.title: Node Count by Stress Range Band
spec.description: Bar chart showing node count across each stress range band

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  'Low (0–5)' AS band, COUNT(*) AS node_count
  FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 0 AND eqstressrange <= 5
UNION ALL SELECT 'Moderate (5–20)', COUNT(*) FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 5 AND eqstressrange <= 20
UNION ALL SELECT 'High (20–50)', COUNT(*) FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 20 AND eqstressrange <= 50
UNION ALL SELECT 'Critical (>50)', COUNT(*) FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 50
ORDER BY 1

spec.title: Stress Range Distribution (Active Nodes)
spec.description: Pie chart of stressed node distribution excluding zero-stress nodes

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  'Low (0–5)' AS band, COUNT(*) AS node_count
  FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 0 AND eqstressrange <= 5
UNION ALL SELECT 'Moderate (5–20)', COUNT(*) FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 5 AND eqstressrange <= 20
UNION ALL SELECT 'High (20–50)', COUNT(*) FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 20 AND eqstressrange <= 50
UNION ALL SELECT 'Critical (>50)', COUNT(*) FROM trailer_fea WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 50

spec.title: Top Nodes by Equivalent Stress Range
spec.description: Top 20 nodes ranked by equivalent stress range with category classification

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  nodenumber AS node,
  ROUND(eqstressrange::numeric, 2) AS eqstressrange,
  CASE
    WHEN eqstressrange > 50 THEN 'Critical (>50)'
    WHEN eqstressrange > 20 THEN 'High (20–50)'
    WHEN eqstressrange > 5  THEN 'Moderate (5–20)'
    ELSE 'Low (0–5)'
  END AS stress_band,
  ROUND(minstress::numeric, 2) AS min_stress,
  ROUND(maxstress::numeric, 2) AS max_stress,
  ROUND(utilizationratio::numeric, 4) AS utilization_ratio,
  ROUND(damage::numeric, 6) AS damage
FROM trailer_fea
WHERE vin = '$Trailer' AND eqstressrange > 0
ORDER BY eqstressrange DESC
LIMIT 30
SELECT time, fmcaxisx AS "X", fmcaxisy AS "Y", fmcaxisz AS "Z" FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 300

WITH acc AS (
  SELECT "time",
  (FMCAxisX::double precision) * 9.81 AS ax_mps2
  FROM trailer_input
  WHERE VIN = '$Trailer' AND $__timeFilter("time")
  -- AND speed > 2  -- ← uncomment if you only want when moving
  ),
  b AS (
    SELECT floor((GREATEST(0.0, -ax_mps2 - 0.5)) / 0.25)::int AS level,
    count(*) AS n
    FROM acc
    WHERE ax_mps2 < -0.5
    GROUP BY 1
    ),
    labeled AS (
      SELECT CASE
      WHEN (0.5 + level*0.25) < 1.0 THEN 'Soft'
      WHEN (0.5 + level*0.25) < 1.5 THEN 'Moderate'
      WHEN (0.5 + level*0.25) < 2.0 THEN 'Harsh'
      ELSE 'Severe'
      END AS label,
      n
      FROM b
      ),
      tot AS (
        SELECT SUM(n) AS total FROM labeled
        )
        SELECT label,
        SUM(n) AS "Events",
        ROUND(100.0 * SUM(n) / (SELECT total FROM tot), 1) AS "Percent"
        FROM labeled
        GROUP BY label
        ORDER BY CASE label
        WHEN 'Soft' THEN 0 WHEN 'Moderate' THEN 1 WHEN 'Harsh' THEN 2 WHEN 'Severe' THEN 3 END

SELECT 
"time",
VIN,
fxbrakeax1total/1000 AS "Fx Brake Axle 1 (kN)",
fxbrakeax2total/1000 AS "Fx Brake Axle 2 (kN)",
fxbrakeax3total/1000 AS "Fx Brake Axle 3 (kN)",
fxbraketotal/1000 AS "Fx Brake Total (kN)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND fxbrakeax1total BETWEEN -200000 AND 200000
AND fxbrakeax2total BETWEEN -200000 AND 200000
AND fxbrakeax3total BETWEEN -200000 AND 200000
AND fxbraketotal BETWEEN -500000 AND 500000
AND xax1lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 AND xax1rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND xax2lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 AND xax2rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND xax3lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 AND xax3rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
ORDER BY "time"

SELECT
"time", VIN,
(fyax1ln + fyax1rn)/1000 AS "Fy Axle 1 (kN)",
(fyax2ln + fyax2rn)/1000 AS "Fy Axle 2 (kN)",
(fyax3ln + fyax3rn)/1000 AS "Fy Axle 3 (kN)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND fyax1ln BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5 AND fyax1rn BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5
AND fyax2ln BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5 AND fyax2rn BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5
AND fyax3ln BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5 AND fyax3rn BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5
ORDER BY "time"

SELECT
"time", VIN,
(fyax1ln + fyax1rn)/1000 AS "Fy Axle 1 (kN)",
(fyax2ln + fyax2rn)/1000 AS "Fy Axle 2 (kN)",
(fyax3ln + fyax3rn)/1000 AS "Fy Axle 3 (kN)",
fytotaln/1000 AS "Fy Total (kN)",
betabodyrad AS "β Body (rad)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND ABS(betabodyrad) <= 0.35
AND fytotaln BETWEEN -3e5 AND 3e5
AND fyax1ln BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5 AND fyax1rn BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5
AND fyax2ln BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5 AND fyax2rn BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5
AND fyax3ln BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5 AND fyax3rn BETWEEN -1e5 AND 1e5
ORDER BY "time" ASC

SELECT "time", VIN, fykingpinnreal/1000 AS "Fy Kingpin (kN)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND fykingpinnreal BETWEEN -1.5e5 AND 1.5e5
ORDER BY "time" ASC

SELECT
"time",
VIN,
(fzax1absln + fzax2absln + fzax3absln)/1000.0 AS "Left total (kN)",
(fzax1absrn + fzax2absrn + fzax3absrn)/1000.0 AS "Right total (kN)",
LTRGroup AS "LTR (ratio)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND fzax1absln BETWEEN 0 AND 2e5 AND fzax1absrn BETWEEN 0 AND 2e5
AND fzax2absln BETWEEN 0 AND 2e5 AND fzax2absrn BETWEEN 0 AND 2e5
AND fzax3absln BETWEEN 0 AND 2e5 AND fzax3absrn BETWEEN 0 AND 2e5
ORDER BY "time" ASC

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
  "time",
  VIN,
  (-fztotaln)/1000.0 AS group_kN
  FROM trailer_loads
  WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
  AND $__timeFilter("time")
  AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
  AND fztotaln BETWEEN -450000 AND 0
  -- 22.5t group safe clamp
  AND xAx1Lm BETWEEN -0.15 AND 0.15 AND xAx1Rm BETWEEN -0.15 AND 0.15
  AND xAx2Lm BETWEEN -0.15 AND 0.15 AND xAx2Rm BETWEEN -0.15 AND 0.15
  AND xAx3Lm BETWEEN -0.15 AND 0.15 AND xAx3Rm BETWEEN -0.15 AND 0.15
  ),
  with_baseline AS (
    SELECT
    "time",
    VIN,
    group_kN,
    AVG(group_kN) OVER (
      ORDER BY "time"
      RANGE BETWEEN INTERVAL '15 minutes' PRECEDING AND INTERVAL '15 minutes' FOLLOWING
      ) AS group_baseline_kN
      FROM base
      )
      SELECT
      "time",
      VIN,
      group_kN - group_baseline_kN AS "Group Dynamic (kN)",
      100.0 * NULLIF((group_kN - group_baseline_kN),0) / NULLIF(group_baseline_kN,0)
      AS "Group Dynamic (% of static)"
      FROM with_baseline
      ORDER BY "time" ASC

WITH raw AS (
  SELECT
  time_bucket('1s',"time") AS "time",
  VIN,
  -- Kingpin & yaw (kN / kN·m)
  AVG(fxkingpinn)/1000.0 AS fx_kp_kN,
  AVG(fykingpinnreal)/1000.0 AS fy_kp_kN,
  AVG(fzkingpinnreal)/1000.0 AS fz_kp_kN,
  AVG(mzyawnm)/1000.0 AS mz_kp_kNm,
  -- Vertical totals from abs sides (kN)
  AVG((fzax1absln+fzax2absln+fzax3absln)/1000.0) AS left_total_kN,
  AVG((fzax1absrn+fzax2absrn+fzax3absrn)/1000.0) AS right_total_kN,
  -- Lateral forces (kN)
  AVG((fyax1ln+fyax1rn)/1000.0) AS fy_ax1_kN,
  AVG((fyax2ln+fyax2rn)/1000.0) AS fy_ax2_kN,
  AVG((fyax3ln+fyax3rn)/1000.0) AS fy_ax3_kN,
  AVG((fyax1ln+fyax1rn+fyax2ln+fyax2rn+fyax3ln+fyax3rn)/1000.0) AS fy_total_kN,
  -- Longitudinal brake total (kN)
  AVG(fxbraketotal/1000.0) AS fx_brake_tot_kN
  FROM trailer_loads
  WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
  AND $__timeFilter("time")
  AND COALESCE(LTRGroup, 0) BETWEEN -1 AND 1
  -- wide sanity clamps (avoid over-filtering)
  AND fzkingpinnreal BETWEEN -400000 AND 400000
  AND mzyawnm BETWEEN -1000000 AND 1000000
  AND fxkingpinn BETWEEN -300000  AND 300000
  AND fykingpinnreal BETWEEN -200000  AND 200000
  AND fzax1absln BETWEEN 0 AND 200000 AND fzax1absrn BETWEEN 0 AND 200000
  AND fzax2absln BETWEEN 0 AND 200000 AND fzax2absrn BETWEEN 0 AND 200000
  AND fzax3absln BETWEEN 0 AND 200000 AND fzax3absrn BETWEEN 0 AND 200000
  AND fytotaln BETWEEN -300000 AND 300000
  AND fyax1ln BETWEEN -100000 AND 100000 AND fyax1rn BETWEEN -100000 AND 100000
  AND fyax2ln BETWEEN -100000 AND 1000005 AND fyax2rn BETWEEN -100000 AND 100000
  AND fyax3ln BETWEEN -100000 AND 100000 AND fyax3rn BETWEEN -100000 AND 100000
  GROUP BY 1,2
  )
  SELECT *
  FROM raw
  ORDER BY "time" ASC

/* LOAD BALANCE — % of time above threshold in window (Front & Rear) */
WITH params AS (
  SELECT 10.0::double precision AS thr_pct,
  interval '30 seconds' AS step
  ),
  ts AS (
    SELECT
    time_bucket((SELECT step FROM params), "time") AS tb,
    100.0 * ABS(AVG(abpreslhfront::double precision) - AVG(abpresrhfront::double precision))
    / NULLIF((AVG(abpreslhfront::double precision) + AVG(abpresrhfront::double precision))/2.0, 0) AS front_mismatch_pct,
    100.0 * ABS(AVG(abpreslhrear::double precision) - AVG(abpresrhrear::double precision))
    / NULLIF((AVG(abpreslhrear::  double precision) + AVG(abpresrhrear:: double precision))/2.0, 0) AS rear_mismatch_pct
    FROM trailer_input
    WHERE VIN = '$Trailer' AND $__timeFilter("time")
    AND speed::double precision BETWEEN 20 AND 80
    AND ABS((FMCAxisY::double precision) * 9.81) < 0.3*9.81
    GROUP BY 1
    ),
    flags AS (
      SELECT tb,
      (front_mismatch_pct > (SELECT thr_pct FROM params)) AS front_exceed,
      (rear_mismatch_pct  > (SELECT thr_pct FROM params)) AS rear_exceed
      FROM ts
      ),
      agg AS (
        SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS n_buckets,
        SUM(front_exceed::int) AS n_front_exceed,
        SUM(rear_exceed::int) AS n_rear_exceed
        FROM flags
        )
        SELECT
        now() AS "time",
        CASE WHEN n_buckets > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * n_front_exceed / n_buckets, 1) ELSE 0 END AS "Front exceed (%)",
        CASE WHEN n_buckets > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * n_rear_exceed  / n_buckets, 1) ELSE 0 END AS "Rear exceed (%)"
        FROM agg

WITH acc AS (
  SELECT
  "time",
  speed::double precision AS speed_kmh,
  sqrt(GREATEST(DLAxle1LRMSZ::double precision, 0.0)) AS a1L_g,
  sqrt(GREATEST(DLAxle1RRMSZ::double precision, 0.0)) AS a1R_g,
  sqrt(GREATEST(DLAxle2LRMSZ::double precision, 0.0)) AS a2L_g,
  sqrt(GREATEST(DLAxle2RRMSZ::double precision, 0.0)) AS a2R_g
  FROM trailer_input
  WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
  AND $__timeFilter("time")
  AND speed::double precision > 2
  ),
  clean AS (
    SELECT
    "time",
    CASE WHEN a1L_g <= 1.0 THEN a1L_g END AS a1L_g,
    CASE WHEN a1R_g <= 1.0 THEN a1R_g END AS a1R_g,
    CASE WHEN a2L_g <= 1.0 THEN a2L_g END AS a2L_g,
    CASE WHEN a2R_g <= 1.0 THEN a2R_g END AS a2R_g
    FROM acc
    ),
    comb AS (
      SELECT
      "time",
      GREATEST(
        COALESCE(a1L_g,0), COALESCE(a1R_g,0),
        COALESCE(a2L_g,0), COALESCE(a2R_g,0)
        ) AS rri_g,
        ((a1L_g IS NOT NULL)::int + (a1R_g IS NOT NULL)::int
        + (a2L_g IS NOT NULL)::int + (a2R_g IS NOT NULL)::int) AS n_ok
        FROM clean
        ),
        bins AS (
          SELECT
          CASE
          WHEN rri_g > 0.40 THEN 4
          WHEN rri_g > 0.30 THEN 3
          WHEN rri_g > 0.20 THEN 2
          WHEN rri_g > 0.10 THEN 1
          ELSE 0
          END AS ord,
          CASE
          WHEN rri_g > 0.40 THEN 'Severe >0.4'
          WHEN rri_g > 0.30 THEN 'Harsh >0.3'
          WHEN rri_g > 0.20 THEN 'Moderate >0.2'
          WHEN rri_g > 0.10 THEN 'Soft >0.1'
          ELSE 'Very Low 0'
          END AS label
          FROM comb
          WHERE n_ok >= 1
          )
          SELECT
          label,
          COUNT(*) AS n
          FROM bins
          GROUP BY label, ord
          ORDER BY ord
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trailer_input WHERE vin = '$Trailer'
SELECT make AS "MAKE", model as "MODEL", active AS "ACTIVE" FROM trailers WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT "time" FROM trailer_loads WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT speed FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' LIMIT 120
SELECT odototal FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY odototal DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT odotrip FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY odototal DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT voltagebattery FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT satellitescount FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT datamode FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT currentbattery FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT voltagetrailer FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT event FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT priority FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT numofrecords FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT gsmsignal FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT imei FROM trailers WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT servertime FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY servertime DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT speedsat FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' LIMIT 120
SELECT "time", latitude, longitude FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT movement FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ignitionstatus FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

/* FRAME HOT-SPOTS — top nodes by risk (uses trailer_feea) */
WITH src AS (
  SELECT NodeNumber::int AS node, VIN,
  COALESCE(Damage,0.0)::double precision AS dmg,
  COALESCE(UtilizationRatio,0.0)::double precision AS ur,
  COALESCE(EqStressRange,0.0)::double precision AS eqr,
  COALESCE(MinStress,0.0)::double precision AS smin,
  COALESCE(MaxStress,0.0)::double precision AS smax,
  COALESCE(MaxStressRrange,0.0)::double precision AS msr
  FROM trailer_fea WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
  ),
  per_node AS (
    SELECT *,
    GREATEST(ur, dmg) AS risk_idx 
    FROM src)
SELECT node AS "Node", ROUND(risk_idx::numeric,3) AS "Risk",
CASE
WHEN ur >= 1.0 OR dmg >= 1.0 THEN 'Critical'
WHEN ur >= 0.90 OR dmg >= 0.70 THEN 'High'
WHEN ur >= 0.75 OR dmg >= 0.40 THEN 'Watch'
ELSE 'Normal'
END
AS "Status",
ROUND(ur::numeric,3) AS "UtilizationRatio",
ROUND(dmg::numeric,3) AS "Damage",
ROUND(eqr::numeric,1) AS "EqStressRange",
ROUND(smin::numeric,1) AS "MinStress",
ROUND(smax::numeric,1) AS "MaxStress",
ROUND(msr::numeric,1) AS "MaxStressRrange"
FROM per_node
ORDER BY risk_idx DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

SELECT "time", VIN, fzkingpinnreal/1000 AS "Fz Kingpin (kN)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
-- AND $__timeFilter("time")
-- AND fzkingpinnreal BETWEEN -4e5 AND 4e5
ORDER BY "time" ASC

SELECT "time", VIN, fxkingpinn/1000 AS "Fx Kingpin (kN)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
AND fxkingpinn BETWEEN -25e4 AND 3e5
ORDER BY "time" DESC

spec.title: Torque around Trailer Axle System (Yaw Moment)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT "time", VIN, mzyawnm/1000 AS "Mz Yaw (kN·m)"
FROM trailer_loads
WHERE VIN = '$Trailer'
AND $__timeFilter("time")
AND LTRGroup BETWEEN -1 AND 1
--AND mzyawnm BETWEEN -5e5 AND 5e5
--AND xax1lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 
--AND xax1rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
--AND xax2lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 
--AND xax2rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
--AND xax3lm BETWEEN -1 AND 1 
--AND xax3rm BETWEEN -1 AND 1
ORDER BY "time"
SELECT abpreslhfront AS "Airbag Pressure Left Front", abpreslhrear AS "Airbag Pressure Left Rear" from trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' LIMIT 120
SELECT abpresrhfront AS "Airbag Pressure Right Front", abpresrhrear AS "Airbag Pressure Right Rear" from trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' LIMIT 120
SELECT statusloaded FROM trailer_loads WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT vin FROM trailers LIMIT 50
